'''Jorus Trass''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] as the [[Chief Linguist]] of the [[Almas Academy]], an experimental [[Jedi academy]] located on [[Almas]] in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Jorus Trass was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], achieving the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Stationed on [[Almas]] in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]], Master Trass served as the [[Chief Linguist]] of the [[Jedi academy|academy]], having trained as a [[Jedi Researcher|researcher]] and specializing as a [[Jedi Researcher#Jedi linguist|linguist]] for many years.<ref name="SOM" />

Among Master Trass' contributions to the field, the Jedi was most famed for the endeavors put into the research of the [[Tarasin Skintone Language|Skintone Language]] of the [[Tarasin]] species. Master Trass compiled all the research findings in a published document entitled, ''[[Shades of Meaning]]''.<ref name="SOM" />
